# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-26

peerd is an open-source (Apache 2.0) in-browser AI agent harness that leverages the browser sandbox and p2p WebRTC for agent isolation and A2A without external middlemen.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Show HN: peerd — AI agent harness that runs entirely in the browser
   Open-source agent substrate that directly addresses prompt-injection isolation — relevant to MCP/agent builders.

2. Cloudflare: Self-Managed OAuth now available to all developers
   Platform capability that lets solo builders own auth without extra vendors.

3. GLM-5.2 is a step change for open agents
   Best open agentic model right now — directly relevant to anyone building agents on open weights.

4. Computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
   Cheap, fast computer-use model — directly useful for automation/agent builders.

5. Show HN: Pure Effect — reproduce production bugs locally without a DB
   Practical testability/debugging pattern for TS solo devs with low adoption cost.
